entity.summary: Seychelles-linked centralized cryptocurrency exchange established in 2018 whose live trading interface was named in a January 2026 FSA warning over unauthorised virtual-asset activity.
entity.notes: Independent profiles place BitStorage's establishment in 2018. The Seychelles FSA states that Bitstorage LTD had been incorporated in Seychelles, was never authorised as a VASP, and was dissolved effective January 1, 2023. Because the live platform's current operator is not independently established, HEI retains medium confidence and does not infer that every current service is operated by the dissolved company.

expected.summary: Centralized cryptocurrency exchange established in 2018 and currently operating spot-trading markets through the BitStorage Finance platform.
expected.notes: Independent exchange directories consistently place BitStorage's establishment in 2018, but they conflict on origin, including Seychelles and Ukraine. The reviewed official exchange and team surfaces do not identify a verifiable legal entity or domicile, so HEI retains the intentionally reviewed Unknown origin rather than forcing a disputed country.

changes.summary: Seychelles-linked centralized cryptocurrency exchange established in 2018 whose live trading interface was named in a January 2026 FSA warning over unauthorised virtual-asset activity.
changes.notes: Independent profiles place BitStorage's establishment in 2018. The Seychelles FSA states that Bitstorage LTD had been incorporated in Seychelles, was never authorised as a VASP, and was dissolved effective January 1, 2023. Because the live platform's current operator is not independently established, HEI retains medium confidence and does not infer that every current service is operated by the dissolved company.

events.title: BitStorage exchange established
events.description: BitStorage was established in 2018 as a centralized cryptocurrency exchange and later operated through the bitstorage.finance domain.
events.notes: The reviewed independent sources agree on the 2018 year but do not establish an exact launch day, so January 1 is used as a year-level date placeholder.

events.title: Seychelles FSA warned over unauthorised BitStorage activity
events.description: The Seychelles Financial Services Authority warned that bitstorage.finance was allegedly operated by Bitstorage LTD, which had no VASP authorisation and had been dissolved effective January 1, 2023.
events.notes: The warning establishes the regulatory and corporate-status issue but does not itself prove that the live platform ceased operating.

evidence.title: BitStorage official website
evidence.notes: Official domain verifies the current BitStorage identity and active exchange interface but does not establish the current legal operator.

evidence.title: Warning: Unauthorised Activity under the Virtual Asset Service Providers Act, 2024
evidence.notes: The FSA states that Bitstorage LTD had no VASP authorisation and had been struck off and dissolved as of January 1, 2023.

evidence.title: CoinGecko exchange reference for BitStorage
evidence.notes: Independent exchange profile corroborates the active BitStorage exchange identity.

evidence.title: CoinGecko BitStorage exchange profile
evidence.notes: CoinGecko identifies BitStorage as a centralized exchange established in 2018.

evidence.title: CoinCodex BitStorage exchange profile
evidence.notes: Independent profile also identifies a 2018 launch; conflicting domicile claims are superseded by the regulator-backed Seychelles linkage.
